text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Nakayama Racecourse has drawn a far larger
crowd than it did last year—indeed, perhaps the
largest in racing history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Maruzensky the Beast and Symboli Rudolf
the Emperor will hold a showdown for the ages.
Everyone is here to see history in the making.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And amidst the crowd's cheers...
Look out! Coming through!
Hey, stop that! You can't just push your way in!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Check it out! This place is packed! And it's still so early!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I think... I might take a rest... Just getting inside
was quite a trial...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, McQueen! Where's that endurance? Aren't
you supposed to be a stayer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Only on the track, not in heaving crowds!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I've ever seen so many people. And
besides...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Can you believe it? We're gonna get to see the Maruzensky race the Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Who will win, the Beast or the Emperor? I'm
gonna tell my grandkids about this race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is packed with outstanding
racers, but Maruzen and the President are all
anyone can talk about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I've never seen a crowd so enthusiastic.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, 'cause they're just that good! Aw man, I
can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna miss a single second! These eyes of mine are gonna see how the Symboli Rudolf wins her races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As time goes on and excitement swells in the
stands...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I suppose this is it. I'll see you later, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I was just wondering if that was all you had to say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Both the media and the fans are calling this race a
battle for the ages.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Should you not offer a little more encouragement
to your trainee?
choice_data_list: You already know everything I could say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah... I suppose I do.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. For entrusting me with your
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well then, once more... I'll see you later.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hello there, Maruzensky. It's been a while.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It sure has. I feel like we never get to see each
other.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Although, that said...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Go Maruzeeen!
Go Rudooolf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just listen to them. They're all itching to
watch us race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Will the Emperor vanquish the Beast, or will the
Beast gobble her up, crowns and all? ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see the Beast's all fired up. The perfect quarry
for the Emperor to display her gallantry.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Will the Emperor vanquish the Beast, you say? ...I
like the sound of that. It might just be time for a
hunt.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yikes. What happened to our kind and caring
President? You sound downright bloodthirsty.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ambition is savage by nature. And besides...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm under strict instructions to be my real self
today. I hope that doesn't disappoint you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Not at all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It just makes me want to gobble you up even
more! ♪ Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and try. I'll drive my sword through
your flank and leave you in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Let's get this started!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Our audience is waiting for us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let's give them the performance of a lifetime.
